rule_metadata.author: Ali Alwashali
rule_metadata.title: Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Command Execution

rules.rule_text:
title: Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Command Execution
id: 076ebe48-cc05-4d8f-9d41-89245cd93a14
related:
- id: b1f73849-6329-4069-bc8f-78a604bb8b23
  type: similar
status: test
description: Detects command execution via ScreenConnect RMM
references:
- https://www.huntandhackett.com/blog/revil-the-usage-of-legitimate-remote-admin-tooling
- https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/pull/4467
author: Ali Alwashali
date: 2023-10-10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.003
logsource:
  service: application
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Provider_Name: ScreenConnect
    EventID: 200
    Data|contains: Executed command of length
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate use of ScreenConnect
level: low
